$schema_note: SAMPLE / PARTIAL / GROUNDED. Hand-authored from the BlueprintLisp exporter's OWN evidence: the importer's authoritative top-level whitelist (BlueprintLispConverter.cpp::Validate, ValidForms set), the AST.h 'Core forms' doc (BlueprintLispAST.h:15-31), the enrich .scm structural-node list (queries/bplisp.scm:12), and the single bundled example (Tests/Regression/villager_select_before_print.bplisp). Format identical to matlang.sample.json: lang -> formName -> {classPath?, properties:{name:{type,default?}}, pins:{name:{required:bool}}}. KEY-RESOLUTION DIFFERS from matlang: bplisp node heads ARE their own name (head==name), so enrich never promotes attrs.node_type; the bplisp semantic pass keys the schema on r['name'] for kind=='node', NOT attrs.node_type. CALL nodes (UFunction invocations) are an OPEN vocabulary (any K2Node_*/UFunction kebab/PascalCase name) and are NOT schema-able by reflection, so they are NOT in this dict and the pass leaves kind=='call' entirely unchecked. This dict therefore covers ONLY the closed STRUCTURAL forms.
$pin_model_note: BlueprintLisp has NO (connect ...) form. Exec/data flow is byte-range CONTAINS (a node's operands are its child sub-lists). Required-ness here is HAND-CURATED and DELIBERATELY EMPTY for almost every form: the matlang $required_pin_caveat applies even more strongly (zero required-pin examples in fixtures, the exporter omits defaulted pins, UE carries no connection-required bit). The one place a form is provably meaningless without an operand is (branch <cond> ...) — a Branch with no condition is degenerate — yet even that is marked 'external': true rather than required:true, because the exporter's emission of the condition operand has not been confirmed against a real dump. Prefer UNKNOWN_FORM warnings over false MISSING_REQUIRED_PIN errors.
$top_level_form_caveat: AUTHORITATIVE top-level whitelist (BlueprintLispConverter.cpp:7933-7939): event, input-action, input-key, component-bound-event, actor-bound-event, func, function, macro, exit, call-macro, var, comment, transition-cond. NOTE the structural pass pass_bplisp_required currently only accepts event|func|function|macro as a graph root — a file rooted on input-action would get a false BPLISP_NO_GRAPH error. That is a STRUCTURAL-pass concern (out of scope here) and is reported, not fixed. This semantic dict lists the structural-node vocabulary (let/set/branch/...) keyed by name; graph roots themselves carry no semantic spec (their identity is checked structurally).

let.$form_note: (let var expr) — local variable / reusable value alias (AST.h:22). 2nd symbol is the bound name (enrich emits a 'binds' edge). No keyword props in the example.

set.$form_note: (set var expr :id ..) — set variable (AST.h:23). Example carries :id only (var/expr are positional). Closed keyword surface (:id) -> strict-props: a stray keyword like :idd is a real typo signal.

seq.$form_note: (seq ...) — execution sequence (AST.h:24); children are statements via contains.

branch.$form_note: (branch cond :true :false) — Branch node (AST.h:25). :true/:false are exec-output keyword slots, NOT data pins. The condition is the first operand (positional), so no named required pin is declared; marked external since exporter emission of an empty branch is unconfirmed.

foreach.$form_note: (foreach item coll ...) — ForEach loop (AST.h:26); item + coll are positional operands.

call.$form_note: (call target func args...) — call method on object (AST.h:27); target/func/args are positional. Distinct from a bare UFunction CALL node (which enrich classifies kind=='call' and the pass never checks).

delay.$form_note: (delay seconds) — Delay node (AST.h:28); seconds is positional.

cast.$form_note: (cast Type var body) — Cast with success exec (AST.h:29); Type/var/body positional.

return.$form_note: (return ...) — function return (.scm structural list). external: not in AST.h Core-forms doc, taken from the enrich .scm node list only.

exit.$form_note: (exit ...) — early exit; ALSO a valid top-level form (Validate whitelist) and a .scm structural node. external: shape per-context unconfirmed.

switch.$form_note: (switch ...) — generic switch; .scm node. external: pin/case shape unconfirmed.

switch-int.$form_note: (switch-int ...) — switch on int; .scm node. external: case shape unconfirmed.

switch-enum.$form_note: (switch-enum ...) — switch on enum; .scm node. external: case shape unconfirmed.

switch-string.$form_note: (switch-string ...) — switch on string; .scm node. external: case shape unconfirmed.

call-parent.$form_note: (call-parent Name [:pin value]) — parent override call (AST.h:20). enrich emits a 'calls' edge to Name. :pin args are per-UFunction (open), so no props enumerated.

call-macro.$form_note: (call-macro Name [:pin value]) — macro instance call (AST.h:21); ALSO a top-level form. :pin args per-macro (open).

vec.$form_note: (vec x y z) — Vector literal (AST.h:30); x/y/z positional.

rot.$form_note: (rot r p y) — Rotator literal (AST.h:31); r/p/y positional.

make-array.$form_note: (make-array ...) — array literal; .scm node. external: element shape unconfirmed.

get-array-item.$form_note: (get-array-item ...) — array index; .scm node. external: pin shape unconfirmed.

break-struct.$form_note: (break-struct :struct .. :value .. :field ..) — struct field break; .scm node. external: confirmed only from the .scm capture comment, not a real dump.
